items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario related to notification delivery failure handling. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or results related to this scenario, nor does it confirm the expected behavior of the system in handling such failures. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing the specific requirements for this scenario, leading to an inconclusive result.
